'''Patar''' was the outermost [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Demar system/Legends|Demar system]].

Composed mostly of [[Methane/Legends|methane]] ice, Patar was the site of a [[Mining/Legends|mining]] operation which was discontinued due to marginal profitability. The world subsequently served as the site of a sensor station in the defenses of the Demar system.

{{Planet-stub}}
